texto: Do you mean disrespectful? Blasphemous?" he asks. " Like Jesus, Jesus, bo-beesus, banana fanana fo-feesus, mo meesus...blasphemous to Jesus?" I just stand there like an idiot, not sure what to say to this strange man. He seems more of a wise guy than a wise man. After all, he just Name-Gamed a Third of the Trinity.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Misty Paquette / Misty Provencher: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Do you mean disrespectful? Blasphemous?" he asks. " Like Jesus, Jesus, bo-beesus, banana fanana f…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humorous, jesus pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
